title: Ants Unleashed
description: A mod that adds different types of ants and their queen
body:
-Description-  
Ants Unleashed adds 4 types of ants along with the Ant Queen. These new ants along with special loot can be found in a new structure, the Ant Hill. The Ant Queen is treated as an overworld boss that will reward the player with loot upon being killed.

-Requirements-  
This mod requires GeckoLib

-Features-  
Chitin - An Item dropped from Ants and Fire Ants that can be used to craft Ant Goggles or a Chitin Block  
Chitin Block - Block made of 4 Chitin, similar in appearance to Ancient Debris, can be made into stairs, slabs, and walls.
Biofuel - Made from a Carrot, Potato, Beetroot, and Apple to breed/tame Soldier Ants
Compound Eye - An item dropped from the Ant Queen used to craft Ant Goggles  
Ant Goggles - Crafted with 3 Chitin, 2 Compound Eyes and a Leather Helmet, Ant Goggles give the Player Night Vision when worn  
Ant Egg - New block that generates in the Ant Hill, summons Ants and Fire Ants  
Soldier Ant Egg - Dropped from breeding Soldier Ants, will spawn a tamed Soldier Ant
New Sand Blocks - To help decorate the Ant Hill, new decorative sand blocks have been added along with red sand blocks  
Ant - Passive mobs that spawn from Ant Eggs that make the Player ride them when attacked  
Fire Ant - Hostile mobs that spawn from Ant Eggs or the Ant Queen that set the Player on fire  
Drone Ant - Flying hostile mobs that spawn from the Ant Queen with low attack but high health  
Soldier Ant - Hostile mobs that spawn from the Ant Queen with high attack but low health  
Ant Queen - A boss that spawns in the Ant Hill, she will attack the Player by shooting Ant Eggs
